<?php namespace Knuckles\Scribe\Tools; use Illuminate\Support\Str; use Parsedown; class MarkdownParser extends Parsedown { public array $headings = []; protected function blockHeader($Line) { $block = parent::blockHeader($Line); if (isset($block['element']['name'])) { $level = (int) trim($block['element']['name'], 'h'); $slug = Str::slug($block['element']['text']); $block['element']['attributes']['id'] = $slug; $this->headings[] = [ 'text' => $block['element']['text'], 'level' => $level, 'slug' => $slug, ]; } return $block; } }
